split.criterion: random 15% of 1341 inscriptions held out (rng seed+2)
libation carriers held out from ledger induction; canonical order predicted per-carrier by leave-one-carrier-out
15% of ALL numerals masked (rng seed+5); reconstruct via ledger arithmetic

prediction.statement: continuity pins (hard) + LA substitution neighborhoods (hard, same-C-or-same-V semantics) are mutually UNSAT (15/24 both-pinned pairs violate)
derived_from: F4 substitution neighborhoods (FULL 1341-inscription corpus, incl. every held-out partition's text)
prediction.target_type: global consistency property of anchor-topology x corpus channel
